mnemonics.title: Euler's Formula
mnemonics.content: VEF-2: Vertices minus Edges plus Faces equals 2

mnemonics.title: Edge Limit
mnemonics.content: 3V-6: Maximum edges in planar graph is 3 times vertices minus 6

mnemonics.title: Kuratowski's Graphs
mnemonics.content: K5 and K3-3: The two forbidden graphs for planarity
